TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mowas_pori, title = mowas_pori, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mowas_pori} }

S.FORM: mowas pori bisya' ci ro nyu si mowas pori laga, yani nya p'iyu maha ya kingan mwalah la. trang mung ta hngiyang pori kwe, ana m'ima cyoli Tayal ga nanu yaca t'aring musa smreyu lukus ro tmapang mhbing Sali, yaca ini kyupiy 'walah.

mowas pori bisya' ci ro nyu si mowas pori laga, yani nya p'iyu maha ya kingan mwalah la. trang mung ta hngiyang pori kwe, ana m'ima cyoli Tayal ga nanu yaca t'aring musa smreyu lukus ro tmapang mhbing Sali, yaca ini kyupiy 'walah.
S.PHON: mowas~ɕ pori βis~ɕjaʔ ʦ~ʨi ro nju s~ɕi mowas~ɕ pori laɣa, jani nja pʔiju maħa ja kiŋan mwalaħ la. traŋ muŋ ta ħŋijaŋ pori kwe, ana mʔima ʦ~ʨjoli tajal ɣa nanu jaʦ~ʨa tʔariŋ mus~ɕa s~ɕmreju lukus~ɕ ro tmapaŋ mħβiŋ s~ɕali, jaʦ~ʨa ini kjupij ʔwalaħ.
